commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a staff-only publisher-member removal API/internal mutation and `clawhub-mod org remove-member`, plus tests and an additional batch scoped-package repair CLI command.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new admin CLI/API capability rather than a bug report. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the route/command while the PR adds it.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/contributor follow-up for real behavior proof and a decision on whether the scoped-package repair command belongs in this PR or should be split.
